zh.lifeSummary: 當Máel Coluim Earl of Angus於1190年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯福爾法爾時，他的父親Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus20歲，母親Beatrix de Douglas16歲。他和Mary Maud Berkeley至少有2個女兒。他去世於1242年在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林登福姆林 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Coluim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: McCallum
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Caluim ‘son of Calum or Colum’, a personal name derived from Latin columba ‘dove’. The surname often represents a short form of Mac Gille Caluim or Mac Giolla Coluim ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of Saint Columba’ (Colum Cille). The personal name (Scottish Calum, Irish Colum, originally combined with giolla ‘servant’) has long been popular in Scotland and Ireland, due largely to the cult of Saint Columba, 521–597, who converted the Picts to Christianity and founded an influential monastery on the island of Iona. His name in Irish is Colum Cille ‘Dove of the Church’.

nameMeanings.name: Máel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

en.lifeSummary: When Máel Coluim Earl of Angus was born in 1190, in Forfar, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus, was 20 and his mother, Beatrix de Douglas, was 16. He had at least 2 daughters with Mary Maud Berkeley. He died in 1242, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Máel Coluim Earl of Angus est né en 1190, à Forfar, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Douglas, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Mary Maud Berkeley. Il est décédé en 1242, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Sc: Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Máel Coluim Earl of Angus 1190 in Forfar, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus 20 und seine Mutter Beatrix de Douglas 16. Er hatte mit Mary Maud Berkeley mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1242 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Máel Coluim Earl of Angus è nato il nel 1190 nel Forfar, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix de Douglas, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Mary Maud Berkeley. Morì nel 1242, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Máel Coluim Earl of Angus(이)가 1190년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 포파르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix de Douglas(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Mary Maud Berkeley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1242년 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인 던퍼라이인 애브브이에 묻혔다.

ru.Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Sc: дунфирмлаин эбби, дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Máel Coluim Earl of Angus родился в 1190 г. в местности форфар, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Douglas, 16. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Mary Maud Berkeley. Он умер в 1242 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности дунфирмлаин эбби, дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.
